data.title: Solayer core developers criticize Eclipse's new solution GSVM for plagiarism and "uselessness"
data.description: Eclipse released the SVM client Giga Scale Virtual Machine (GSVM) related documents today, and Solayer core developer Chaofan Shou forwarded it and criticized Eclipse for plagiarism. Chaofan Shou added that the GSVM solution has the same idea and similar demonstration process as a technical solution that Solayer has released before, but Solayer has proved that the solution does not work in the actual operating environment.

data.title: Eclipse Faces Accusations of Plagiarism Over GSVM Documentation
data.description: According to Odaily, Eclipse recently released documentation for its SVM client, Giga Scale Virtual Machine (GSVM). Solayer's core developer, Chaofan Shou, criticized Eclipse, accusing them of plagiarism. Shou stated that the GSVM proposal shares the same ideas and a similar demonstration process with a technical plan previously released by Solayer. However, Solayer has demonstrated that this plan is ineffective in a real-world operational environment.

data.title: XRP Price Downplays Highly Anticipated Conclusion of Ripple-SEC Lawsuit, Why?
data.description:
XRP price has reacted as the SEC versus Ripple legal battle eventually reached its long awaited conclusion. However, it has turned out to be anticlimactic for XRP holders who anticipated a major price move. Many had high bullish expectorations for XRP price upon the conclusion of the SEC-Ripple legal battle were not misplaced.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/20/xrp-price-downplays-highly-anticipated-conclusion-of-ripple-sec-lawsuit-why/

data.title: Pump.fun has banned Indian users
data.description: Community users discovered that Pump.fun, a Solana-based Meme coin publishing platform, said it had banned Indian users from accessing it.

data.title: Yesterday, BITB had a net outflow of US$17.4 million and GBTC had a net outflow of US$8 million
data.description: Farside Investors monitoring showed that yesterday Bitwise's BITB had a net outflow of US$17.4 million, Grayscale's GBTC had a net outflow of US$8 million, and Franklin's EZBC had a net outflow of US$7.3 million.

data.title: Whale Resurfaces with Significant UNI Purchase
data.description: According to PANews, OnchainLens monitoring revealed that a major cryptocurrency holder, often referred to as a 'whale,' made a significant transaction five hours ago after a 3.5-month hiatus. The whale spent 1,000 ETH, approximately valued at $1.97 million, to acquire 290,212 UNI tokens at an average price of $6.78 each. Despite this substantial purchase, the whale still retains 1,016 ETH, worth around $2 million.

data.title: Trump's nominee for SEC chairman, Paul Atkins, to face Senate confirmation hearing next week
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Paul Atkins, the nominee for the chairman of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), will attend the Senate Banking Committee confirmation hearing on March 27. If approved, the full Senate will hold a final vote. Atkins, a former SEC commissioner, is a supporter of digital assets and previously founded a financial compliance consulting firm in Washington. He is expected to continue the pro-crypto regulatory stance promoted by the Trump administration and succeed former SEC Chairman Gary Gensler, who has been criticized for his "enforcement-style regulation" of the crypto industry.
Also hearing on the same day was Jonathan Gould, the nominee for director of the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC), which is responsible for supervising U.S. national banks and is crucial to crypto companies' efforts to gain bank access and regulate the issuance of stablecoins. In addition, the Senate will also consider Luke Pettit's nomination as Assistant Secretary of the Treasury. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Gemini to Serve as Custodian for Evolve Leveraged Crypto ETF
data.description: Crypto trading platform Gemini has announced that it will serve as custodian for the Evolve Levered Bitcoin ETF and the Evolve Levered Ether ETF, which began trading on the Toronto Stock Exchange on Tuesday under the tickers LBIT and LETH. Both ETFs offer investors leveraged exposure to the world of cryptocurrencies, with the potential to “realize amplified returns while maintaining high standards of security and regulatory compliance.”

data.title: Tether Secures Seventh-Largest Spot in U.S. Treasury Holdings
data.description:
Tether ranks as the seventh-largest buyer of U.S. Treasuries in 2024, with a significant purchase of $33.1 billion.
source: https://coincu.com/327687-tether-seventh-largest-treasury-buyer

data.title: OCC ends reputation risk examinations amid backlash from the crypto industry over debanking
data.description:
The U.S. OCC said it has ended examining national banks and other financial institutions for reputational risk.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/347391/occ-ends-reputation-risk-examinations-amid-backlash-from-the-crypto-industry-over-debanking?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
